name: errors-ingest-honeypot
_note: Public. Honeypot drop path: a non-empty `website` triggers a silent 201 with the distinct body {ok:true, id:null, fingerprint:null, count:0, first_seen_at:null} (no `ref`) BEFORE any DB write or JWT read. Fully deterministic, mutates nothing — the safest errors parity check. Both Node and Go must return 201 + this exact body.
